title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
